display_information.name: Clarion
display_information.description: The accessibility layer for Slack. Plain-language rewrites, catch-up digests, screen-reader alt-text, and instant jargon definitions.
display_information.long_description: Clarion makes every Slack conversation accessible to everyone. It rewrites dense, jargon-heavy messages into clear plain language for neurodivergent colleagues, non-native English speakers, and anyone with a cognitive or reading difference. It produces catch-up digests of long threads, generates screen-reader alt-text for images, and defines acronyms and jargon in real time using workspace context. Clarion is an inclusion layer that works wherever your team already works.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Ask Clarion to simplify a message, summarize a thread, describe an image, or define a term.

shortcuts.name: Simplify this message
shortcuts.description: Rewrite this message in clear, plain language.

shortcuts.name: Describe image
shortcuts.description: Generate screen-reader alt-text for images in this message.

shortcuts.name: Catch me up
shortcuts.description: Summarize this thread into a plain-language catch-up digest.
